headline: The Nasdaq's Historic Rally Doesn't Mean the Risk Is Gone
summary: Marc Chaikin of Chaikin Analytics shares seven bullish stock picks across AI infrastructure and semiconductors while warning investors to trim software and cybersecurity holdings.
